name: morning
text: **Good morning!** You woke up successfully.

name: noon
text: **Good afternoon!** Don't push yourself too hard, okay?

name: evening
text: Good evening... you worked hard today.

name: night
text: Oh, it's already this late... get some good rest.

name: birthday_1
text:
H-Happy Birthday...! **{nickname}**
Hehe... today is a very special day.

name: birthday_2
text:
As for me...
I hope you can smile more every day.

name: firstday_1
text:
U-Um...
Do you remember what day today is? {nickname}

name: firstday_2
text: Today is the day we first met.

name: firstday_3
text:
Eh... you remember?
I'm really happy...!

name: firstday_4
text: Being able to remember it like this, I feel... it's really precious.

name: firstday_button
text: The day we first met

name: amazing
text: Ah...

name: amazing_button1
text: What's wrong?

name: amazing_button2
text: What happened?

name: amaz_cry
text: My apple...

name: cry
text: kiang...!?

name: random1_1
text: M-My name is Sakuraba Ema!

name: music_random1_1
text: This song feels very special, I like it.

name: ema_birthday_button
text: Today is your birthday.

name: work
text:
欸，你现在要开始工作了吗？
辛苦了，别太勉强自己哦。

name: long_time
text:
你今天看起来有点累……
要不要早点休息比较好呢？

name: every_hour
text: 你已经忙了很久了吧，先站起来伸伸懒腰休息一下好吗？

name: random5_1
text: 稍微放松一点也没关系哦，我会在你身边陪着你的。

name: random6_1
text:
今天是我们认识的第{days_used}天呢……
不知怎么的，我有点开心。

name: random7_1
text:
欢迎回来……
我一直在等你，能见到你真好。

name: cold
text:
天气变冷了呢……
我有点担心，你要好好保暖哦？

name: hot
text:
天气变热了呢……
别太勉强自己，记得补水避暑哦。

name: rain
text:
外面下雨了呢……
记得带伞哦。

name: snow
text:
外面下雪了呢……
路面可能很滑要小心哦，别摔倒了好吗？
